title: haplopappus hirtus var. sonchifolius
intro: Haplopappus hirtus var. sonchifolius, also known as a variety of the Sonchus plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The health benefits of Haplopappus hirtus var. sonchifolius include its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues and its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used to make teas, salves, and ointments to support overall health and well-being.
